title: 若駒Sの後に・負けども夏は来る

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature gets a decent result in the
Wakagoma Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, when she sees how Tokai Teio has
captivated the crowd with her brilliant
performance, she becomes discouraged.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest a trip to enter a local race, the Kokura
Kinen, to give her more confidence.
